name: @cortexkit/pi-openai-auth
description_en: Pi package for CortexKit OpenAI Codex OAuth support. It overrides Pi's built-in `openai-codex` provider with a CortexKit provider extension backed by Pi's OpenAI Codex Responses transport and OAuth primitives.
description_zh: CortexKit OpenAI Codex OAuth 支持的 Pi 包。它覆盖 Pi 的内置 `openai-codex` 提供程序，使用由 Pi 的 OpenAI Codex Responses 传输和 OAuth 原语支持的 CortexKit 提供程序扩展
